name: Kiwifruit & Strawberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the kiwifruits and slice them into thin rounds.
2. Arrange the sliced kiwifruit on dessert plates.
3. Wash, hull, and slice the strawberries.
4. Arrange the sliced strawberries over the kiwifruit.
5. Drizzle orange juice over each dish.
6. Top with toasted pine nuts.
